subcodes.first_line: We have commanded all people to steadfastness; yet some among the companions, upon merely witnessing certain deeds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع ناس را باستقامت امر نمودیم مع ذلک بعضی از اصحاب بمجرد مشاهده اعمال
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
